name: WLF_EVENT_ASSIGNMENTS_F
description: Table to store learning item event assignments.

columns.Name: EVENT_ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: System generated unique identifier.

columns.Name: CATEGORY
columns.Comments: This column stores the category of the assignment, this is applicable mainly for recommendations to categorize recommendations

columns.Name: INITIAL_ACTUAL_SCORE
columns.Comments: INITIAL_ACTUAL_SCORE

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_PROFILE_NUMBER
columns.Comments: ASSIGNMENT_PROFILE_NUMBER

columns.Name: ACCESS_PERMISSION_ID
columns.Comments: Assignment level access permission id to the learning item

columns.Name: PRIORITY
columns.Comments: PRIORITY

columns.Name: IS_ADHOC
columns.Comments: IS_ADHOC

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the beginning of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the end of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: EVENT_ID
columns.Comments: EVENT_ID

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_RULE_ID
columns.Comments: ASSIGNMENT_RULE_ID

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: Current status of the profile {NEW, MODIFIED, INPROCESS, ACTIVE, DELETED}.

columns.Name: INITIAL_RECORD_STATUS
columns.Comments: Initial assignment record status {ORA_ASSN_REC_ACTIVE,RA_ASSN_REC_REQUESTED}.

columns.Name: PROCESSED_DATE
columns.Comments: The time the share profile was processed.

columns.Name: COMMENTS
columns.Comments: Recommendation Comments.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_START_DATE
columns.Comments: The Date when the assignment should become Active.

columns.Name: REQUEST_DETAIL_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of request detail. Foreign key to WLF_REQUEST_DETAILS.

columns.Name: PRICING_RULE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of pricing rule. Foreign key to WLF_PRICING_RULES_F.

columns.Name: PRICING_RULE_EFFECTIVE_DATE
columns.Comments: Indicates date from which price is effective.

columns.Name: LATEST_REQUEST_PROCESS_ID
columns.Comments: Represent latest ESS Job ID

columns.Name: LATEST_ESS_JOB_ID
columns.Comments: Latest ESS Job Id that has triggered the Event Assignment

columns.Name: DYNAMIC_FLAG
columns.Comments: Populated Dynamic flag value.

columns.Name: RUN_AS_ID
columns.Comments: Person identifier specifying who the user is that the ESS jobs should be run as.

columns.Name: PAYMENT_RULE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of pricing rule Payment Type. Foreign key to WLF_PAYMENT_RULES_F.

columns.Name: INITIAL_REASON_CODE
columns.Comments: Initial reason for assignment status completion.

columns.Name: INITIAL_COMPLETION_DATE
columns.Comments: The date and time of the completion of the assignment.

columns.Name: INITIAL_RECORD_SUBSTATUS
columns.Comments: Initial assignment record substatus.

columns.Name: INITIAL_COMMENTS
columns.Comments: Comments for assignment status completion.

columns.Name: INITIAL_TOTAL_ACTUAL_EFFORT
columns.Comments: Actual effort learner has spent on an assignment.

columns.Name: CATEGORY_ID
columns.Comments: The category id for the assignment category

columns.Name: PROCESS_ADVANCED_RULE_UPDATES
columns.Comments: This column specify whether to apply advanced rule updates to existing assignment records or not

columns.Name: PROCESSING_FREQUENCY
columns.Comments: Processing frequency

columns.Name: IS_SUBORDINATE
columns.Comments: This column specify whether to event assignment for course created as subordinate while creating assignment for Offering

columns.Name: REASON_CODE
columns.Comments: Status change reason code

columns.Name: STATUS_CHANGE_COMMENT
columns.Comments: Status change comment

columns.Name: RECORD_STATUS_ON_CANCEL
columns.Comments: Assignment record status on cancel

columns.Name: EXCLUDE_ENROLLMENT_FROM_HIST
columns.Comments: Exclude enrollment from history option
